languages.text: "Последствия твоей гибели могут быть невыносимы для Нунциуса. Ты готов пойти на это, зная, что оставишь его в одиночестве?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
languages.original_text: "Последствия твоей гибели могут быть невыносимы для Нунциуса. Ты готов пойти на это, зная, что оставишь его в одиночестве?"

traits.locale_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"
"The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

languages.text: "Die Last Eures Todes wäre mehr als Nuncius ertragen kann. Wollt Ihr das wirklich tun, im Wissen, dass Ihr ihn damit ganz allein lasst?"
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: "Die Last Eures Todes wäre mehr als Nuncius ertragen kann. Wollt Ihr das wirklich tun, im Wissen, dass Ihr ihn damit ganz allein lasst?"

languages.text: « Nuncius sera incapable de porter le fardeau de votre mort. Allez-vous vraiment choisir de l'abandonner ainsi ? »
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: « Nuncius sera incapable de porter le fardeau de votre mort. Allez-vous vraiment choisir de l'abandonner ainsi ? »

languages.text: «El peso de su muerte sería insoportable para Nuncius. ¿De verdad puede hacer esto sabiendo que lo dejará completamente solo?».
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: «El peso de su muerte sería insoportable para Nuncius. ¿De verdad puede hacer esto sabiendo que lo dejará completamente solo?».

languages.text: "Ölümünün yükü, Nuncius'un dayanabileceğinden daha fazla olur. Onu yapayalnız bırakacağını bile bile gerçekten bunu yapabilir misin?"
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: "Ölümünün yükü, Nuncius'un dayanabileceğinden daha fazla olur. Onu yapayalnız bırakacağını bile bile gerçekten bunu yapabilir misin?"

languages.text: “你若是死了，努恩修斯肯定难以接受。你忍心丢下他一个人吗？”
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: “你若是死了，努恩修斯肯定难以接受。你忍心丢下他一个人吗？”

languages.text: 「君の死の重みは、ヌンキウスには耐えきれないものになるだろう。彼を独りきりにすると分かっていて、本当にこれをやり遂げられるのか？」
languages.original_text: "The weight of your death would be more than Nuncius can bear. Can you really go through with this, knowing you'll leave him all alone?"

traits.locale_text: 「君の死の重みは、ヌンキウスには耐えきれないものになるだろう。彼を独りきりにすると分かっていて、本当にこれをやり遂げられるのか？」
